snippet.title: AS Batalkan Izin Penjualan Minyak Iran, Sanksi Kembali Berlaku
snippet.description:
POS-KUPANG.COM - Amerika Serikat (AS) mencabut izin penjualan minyak Iran setelah serangkaian serangan terhadap kapal-kapal komersial di sekitar Selat Hormuz yang menurut pejabat AS dilakukan oleh Iran. 

Keputusan tersebut sekaligus mengakhiri lebih cepat pelonggaran sanksi yang sempat diberikan sebagai bagian dari kesepahaman sementara antara Washington dan Teheran hingga memicu kenaikan harga minyak dunia lebih dari 5 persen. 

Departemen Keuangan AS mengumumkan pencabutan General License X, lisensi yang sebelumnya mengizinkan produksi, pengiriman, dan penjualan minyak Iran, dalam kerangka kesepahaman (Memorandum of Understanding/MoU) antara kedua negara. 

Dalam pernyataannya, Kantor Pengawasan Aset Luar Negeri (OFAC) menyebut lisensi tersebut resmi dicabut menyusul meningkatnya serangan di sekitar Selat Hormuz karena sepenuhnya bergantung pada perilaku Teheran. (POS-KUPANG.COM, Kompas.com)

If you need help starting the Black Square Cessna Grand Caravan, I have a hand-written functional procedure that walks you through where to look, what to press, what to turn, and what to configure in the right order, and without breaking anything. You can get a copy from the link below:

I am using SayIntentions.AI to provide air traffic services, and aircraft injection during the flight. If you like the look of SayIntentions.AI, you can click the link below to try it out for free!

snippet.title: Cows Don't Lie | Our First Summit in the Beskidy
snippet.description:
Some climbs are about the summit. This one was about taking our time getting there.

This was our first time in the Beskidy, and we picked Jasień (1062 m) for the activation — a quiet peak in the Beskid Wyspowy, right on the edge of the Gorce. The guidebooks say two hours up. We took nearly four. Not because it was hard, but because we stopped for breakfast. Then second breakfast. Then a third, somewhere with a good view. With kids, the trail is the destination.

There's an old piece of Polish weather wisdom: if you spot cows lying down in the grass before noon, rain is coming in the afternoon. We saw exactly that on the way up. So we kept one eye on the sky. I went ahead with the older kids to set up the gear, my wife followed with the younger ones, and I got the activation done — just in time. The rain came right on cue. Only 40 minutes, not heavy, but enough to send us back down a fair bit of the mountain we'd just climbed.

Then the sun came back out. So naturally, we ate again. Walked a little. Ate again. Took in the views. And somewhere in all that wandering, it turned into one of those days you don't want to end.

SOTA (Summits on the Air) is a program where licensed amateur radio operators activate mountain summits around the world, making contacts from the top. Some summits are quick missions. This one was a slow, beautiful family day that happened to have a radio at the top.

This is Family on the Air — FOTA SOTA. The cows were right, by the way.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📍 Location: Jasień (1062 m), Beskid Wyspowy, Poland
🔖 SOTA Reference: SP/BZ-026
📻 Callsign: HF2LT
🌐 Summits on the Air: sotl.as
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

More summits, more breakfasts, more weather read from livestock.
#SOTA #SummitsOnTheAir #HamRadio #FamilyOnTheAir #FOTASOTA #Poland #AmateurRadio #Beskidy #FamilyAdventure

snippet.title: Come trail running with me and bounce some Morse code off the ionosphere. 1st Summit on the air.

snippet.title: MINI Cooper License Plate Carrier Replacement DIY (2014-2024 MINI Countryman, Clubman, BMW X1)
snippet.description:
►Plastic never lasts in the sun. The license plate bracket for many modern MINIs and the BMW X1 and X2 models gets brittle with sun exposure, weakening it. It will eventually weaken to the point where the license plate mounting screws touch the paint behind it, scratching it. They can also break with just a little handling, making them a common replacement component.

Replacing the license plate bracket is a very straightforward DIY job. You'll simply need to remove your license plate and then the two screws mounting the bracket to the bumper. From there, you'll be free to install the new component. 

In this video, Cole Evans, FCP Euro's In-House Technician, replaces the license plate frame bracket on an F60 MINI Countryman.

snippet.title: Where can I operate on the 6meter Band #magicband #hamradio #beginners
snippet.description:
The 6 m band where to operate who can operate on it a little tutorial for all you beginners out there.  

If you’ve never been on 6 m then I suggest you do all amateur radio licensed classes have full privileges on the 6 m band 

Morse code voice side band, AM, FM, Digital modes are accepted on 6 m  

Some folks like to key CW, others phone, some like to use EME earth moon, earth or moon bounce on this amazing VHF band. ￼

So stick around and let’s check out the magic band and see what it’s all about. 

https://vhf.dxview.org/

snippet.title: 1st POTA 40M NVIS Inverted-V @ 7Ft US-1675 Haley Farm State Park CT
snippet.description:
NVIS POTA US-1675 w/ 40M Inverted-V @ 7Ft (Haley Farm State Park) CT

Build and setup a 40M Dipole Antenna for Near Vertical Incident Skywave (NVIS) configuration to activate my first POTA @ US-1675 at Haley Farm State Park in Groton, CT. I setup the antenna in a 7 ft height Inverted-V. We measure and compare the SWR readings using a RigExpert Antenna Analyzer. #nvis

snippet.title: Walkie Talkie Working Principle in Hindi | Walkie Talkie Kaise Kaam Karta H?। #shorts #walkietalkies
snippet.description:
Kya aapne kabhi socha hai ki Walkie Talkie bina mobile tower aur internet ke kaise kaam karta hai? 🤔
Is video me hum Walkie Talkie ki complete working step-by-step samjhenge. Aap jaanenge ki microphone, amplifier, modulator, RF oscillator, antenna aur receiver milkar kaise radio waves ke through communication karte hain.
Topics Covered: ✔ Walkie Talkie kya hota hai
✔ PTT (Push To Talk) button ka kaam
✔ Microphone signal generation
✔ RF Oscillator aur Modulation
✔ Antenna kaise transmit karta hai
✔ Receiver signal ko kaise receive karta hai
✔ Speaker awaaz kaise nikalta hai
✔ Walkie Talkie bina network kaise kaam karta hai
Agar aap Electrical, Electronics, Communication ya Engineering ke student hain to ye video aapke liye bahut useful hai.
Subscribe karein Junior Engineer HK ko aise hi engineering videos ke liye.

snippet.title: 7 MUST-HAVE SDR Software on DragonOS Focal | Complete Beginner to Pro Guide
snippet.description:
#SDR #DragonOS #HackRF #RTLSDR #GNURadio #SDRPlusPlus #GQRX #SDRangel #SigDigger #QSpectrumAnalyzer #Linux #RF #SpectrumAnalyzer #Wireless #HamRadio #Electronics #CyberSecurity #RFEngineering #SoftwareDefinedRadio #OpenSource


DragonOS Focal is one of the best Linux distributions for Software Defined Radio (SDR), RF engineering, signal intelligence, wireless security research, and digital communications. In this video, I introduce and demonstrate the most useful SDR applications that come pre-installed with DragonOS Focal.

Whether you're using a HackRF One, RTL-SDR, PlutoSDR, LimeSDR, BladeRF, USRP, or other compatible SDR hardware, these applications provide powerful capabilities for spectrum monitoring, signal analysis, demodulation, waterfall visualization, and SDR development.

Software Covered

✔ QSpectrumAnalyzer
✔ GQRX
✔ SDRangel
✔ SigDigger
✔ SDR++
✔ GNU Radio Companion (GRC)
✔ HackRF Sweeper

During the video, I explain what each application is used for, its main features, and when you should choose one over another.

This video is ideal for:

• SDR Beginners
• Amateur Radio Operators
• RF Engineers
• Wireless Security Researchers
• Electronics Students
• GNU Radio Users
• HackRF One Users
• RTL-SDR Users

If you're planning to build your own SDR lab using DragonOS Focal, this video will help you understand the available tools and choose the right software for your projects.

👍 If you enjoy SDR, RF, GNU Radio, HackRF, PortaPack, wireless communications, and spectrum analysis, consider subscribing for more practical demonstrations and tutorials.


🔔 Don’t forget to Like & Subscribe to the channel, and click the Bell Icon to stay updated with the latest tutorials, experiments, and SDR-based projects!

📡 Explore more SDR, RF, and wireless communication content on my YouTube channel:👉 @Muhammed_Mustaqim

GitHub Repositories: https://github.com/mmustaqim

🎥 Join me on a journey through Software Defined Radio, Digital Modulation, Wireless Systems, and more practical demonstrations designed for enthusiasts, students, and professionals.

snippet.title: Halve and then multiply: Getting from 11 MHz to the 27 MHz CB band
snippet.description:
Watch to see how I can get frequencies like 5.5, 16.5, 27.5 MHz and more from an 11 MHz crystal by using a 74HC74 frequency divider. I use this in a 'Super VXO' arrangement to operate as a beat frequency oscillator to aid reception of SSB CBers with an AM only 27 MHz CB radio. This draws from circuits in Experimental Methods in RF Design. 

PS: If you liked this video please consider supporting Amateur Radio VK3YE by: 
Subscribing on YouTube Checking my books page at https://books.vk3ye.com 
Shopping on Amazon via: https://amzn.to/3iiDQXv, or 
Shopping on eBay via: https://ebay.us/i9DuWP 
(then if you buy something I'll get a small commission at no cost to you)

snippet.title: NanoVNA für Einsteiger - So verstehst du deine Antenne wirklich
snippet.description:
NanoVNA für Einsteiger - So verstehst du deine Antenne wirklich

In diesem Video schauen wir uns den NanoVNA aus Einsteiger-Sicht an. Es geht nicht darum, jedes Detail eines Netzwerkanalysators sofort perfekt zu verstehen. Wir schauen auf die wichtigsten Grundlagen: SWR, Resonanz, Messpunkt, Kalibrierung und die Frage, was eine Antenne wirklich macht.

Der NanoVNA kann Funkamateuren helfen, Antennen besser zu verstehen. Nicht nur als Zahl auf dem Display, sondern als Verlauf über einen Frequenzbereich. Genau dadurch wird sichtbar, ob eine Antenne im gewünschten Bereich arbeitet und wie sie auf Veränderungen reagiert.

Schreibt gerne in die Kommentare, welche Antenne ihr zuerst oder zuletzt mit dem NanoVNA gemessen habt.

snippet.title: 📻 MI INSTALACIÓN DE 100 W HF EN MI QTH 📡
snippet.description:
📡 ¡Bienvenidos a mi instalación HF en casa! 🏠
En este video de 10 minutos, os muestro paso a paso mi equipo de radioafición en el QTH. 🔧
Comienzo presentando mi transceptor XIEGU X6200, un equipo compacto y fiable 📻.
Os enseño también mi fuente de alimentación fija de 13,8V y 30A, perfecta para un suministro estable ⚡.
No falta el cable coaxial que conecta todo 📏, ni mi amplificador de 100W, listo para dar potencia a las señales 📡💪.
Por último, os muestro la antena que he instalado, ideal para las bandas HF 📡🌐.
¡Acompáñame en este vídeo y descubre cómo he montado mi estación de radioaficionado en casa! 🚀
Si te gusta la radioafición, suscríbete, deja un like y activa las notificaciones 🔔.

snippet.title: Ham Radio for Beginners Ep. 14 | Power Supplies & Batteries Explained
snippet.description:
Your ham radio won't get very far without the right power source.

In Episode 14 of the Ham Radio for Beginners series, Josh AA4WX explains how to safely power your amateur radio station. Learn the difference between AC and DC power, switching and linear power supplies, LiFePO₄ batteries, Anderson Powerpole connectors, fuses, and how to choose the right power supply for your radio.

Whether you're building your first home station or planning a portable setup for POTA or Field Day, this episode will help you make smart power decisions.

In this episode:
AC vs. DC power
Why most radios use 13.8V DC
Switching vs. linear power supplies
How many amps do you need?
LiFePO₄ batteries
AGM batteries
Anderson Powerpole connectors
Fuses and circuit protection
Portable power tips
Common beginner mistakes

snippet.title: AS Batalkan Izin Penjualan Minyak Iran, Sanksi Kembali Berlaku
snippet.description:
POS-KUPANG.COM - Amerika Serikat (AS) mencabut izin penjualan minyak Iran setelah serangkaian serangan terhadap kapal-kapal komersial di sekitar Selat Hormuz yang menurut pejabat AS dilakukan oleh Iran. 

Keputusan tersebut sekaligus mengakhiri lebih cepat pelonggaran sanksi yang sempat diberikan sebagai bagian dari kesepahaman sementara antara Washington dan Teheran hingga memicu kenaikan harga minyak dunia lebih dari 5 persen. 

Departemen Keuangan AS mengumumkan pencabutan General License X, lisensi yang sebelumnya mengizinkan produksi, pengiriman, dan penjualan minyak Iran, dalam kerangka kesepahaman (Memorandum of Understanding/MoU) antara kedua negara. 

Dalam pernyataannya, Kantor Pengawasan Aset Luar Negeri (OFAC) menyebut lisensi tersebut resmi dicabut menyusul meningkatnya serangan di sekitar Selat Hormuz karena sepenuhnya bergantung pada perilaku Teheran. (POS-KUPANG.COM, Kompas.com)

snippet.title: Streamlining the Skies: DGCA’s New Licensing Policy 📊✈️
snippet.description:
A major step forward for "Ease of Doing Business" in Indian aviation. The DGCA has decentralized flight crew licensing operations through the eGCA platform.  
By delegating the issuance of CPLs and ratings directly to regional hubs, the regulator aims to optimize administrative workflows, reduce latency times, and smoothly cater to the rising demand for commercial pilots across the country.
Key Highlights:
🔹 Direct regional processing under eGCA framework
🔹 Reduced administrative burden on Delhi HQ
🔹 Faster turnaround times for license issuance and ratings  
How do you think this change will impact flight training timelines in India? Let's discuss in the comments.

snippet.title: What Is Diversity Reception? (it's not 2-VFO stereo monitoring)
snippet.description:
A few people commented on my recent 2-VFO Stereo Monitoring video and said, "That's diversity reception!" Not quite... But nearly...

In this video I explain the difference between deliberately listening to two antennas separately (what I'm now calling **Stereo Monitoring**) and true **Diversity Reception**, where two or more independent signal paths are combined to reduce fading and improve readability.

We'll look at:

• Why diversity reception was developed
• Who first used it (marine, military and commercial HF operators)
• Why antennas are often spaced well apart
• Why fading occurs in the first place
• How diversity receivers work
• Why I intentionally *don't* combine the signals in my own setup

If you've ever wondered why one antenna fades while another doesn't, or why some high-end radios support diversity reception, hopefully this video will make it a little clearer.

PS - No AI was used to make the thumbnail!

73,
Callum M0XXT

#HamRadio #AmateurRadio #DiversityReception #HF #DXCommander #Shortwave

snippet.title: The Morse Code Shortcut Nobody Tells You
snippet.description:
Traditional Morse code learning requires weeks of drilling to memorize 26 random patterns. This binary tree trainer changes everything with one simple rule: dots go right, dashes go left. Common letters like E and T sit at the top requiring minimal signals, while rare letters sit at the bottom. You learn layer by layer, and your brain shifts from memorizing patterns to following a visual path. Hours instead of weeks.

#MorseCode #BinaryTree #LearningHack #CircuitBoard #TechEducation #HamRadio #VisualLearning #EdTech #Telegraph #LifeHack

snippet.title: Dadi and pota Gurudwara Langer di sewa krde hoye #familybond  #villagelife #familylove #dadi
snippet.description:
🙏 ਦਾਦੀ ਤੇ ਪੋਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਲੰਗਰ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਦੇ ਹੋਏ | ਸੇਵਾ ਹੀ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਡੀ ਭਗਤੀ ❤️

ਇਸ ਸੁਹਣੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਵਿੱਚ ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਦਾਦੀ ਆਪਣੇ ਪੋਤੇ ਨਾਲ ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰਾ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਵਿੱਚ ਲੰਗਰ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰ ਰਹੀ ਹੈ। ਦਾਦੀ ਆਪਣੇ ਪੋਤੇ ਨੂੰ ਸਿਖਾ ਰਹੀ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਨਿਮਰਤਾ, ਪਿਆਰ ਅਤੇ ਨਿਸ਼ਕਾਮ ਸੇਵਾ ਹੀ ਸੱਚੀ ਇਨਸਾਨੀਅਤ ਹੈ। ਛੋਟੀ ਉਮਰ ਤੋਂ ਹੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਅਤੇ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਦੇ ਸੰਸਕਾਰ ਬੱਚਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਜੀਵਨ ਨੂੰ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਬਣਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

ਆਓ ਅਸੀਂ ਵੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਘਰ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਦਾ ਸਤਿਕਾਰ ਕਰੀਏ ਅਤੇ "ਵੰਡ ਛਕੋ, ਨਾਮ ਜਪੋ ਤੇ ਕਿਰਤ ਕਰੋ" ਦੇ ਸਿਧਾਂਤ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੀ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਪਣਾਈਏ।

**ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ ਜੀ ਕਾ ਖਾਲਸਾ, ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੀ ਫਤਹਿ! 🙏**

#Waheguru #Gurudwara #LangarSewa #PunjabiDadi #GrandmotherLove #Pota #Sikhism #Seva #WaheguruJi #PunjabiCulture #FamilyValues #blessings

snippet.title: BBC Director General: Licence Fee "no longer fit for purpose" | Storm & Alexis
snippet.description:
Is it finally time to get rid of the TV licence?

The BBC's new Director-General says the £180-a-year TV licence is "no longer fit for purpose" and has suggested replacing it with a compulsory household levy, potentially changing the way the BBC is funded for generations to come.

Supporters argue the current licence fee is outdated in the age of streaming services like Netflix, Disney+ and Amazon Prime Video, and that a new funding model could provide greater certainty for the BBC.

Critics say replacing the licence fee with a compulsory levy would simply amount to another tax, forcing households to pay for a service they may not use.

Should Britain scrap the TV licence altogether, reform it, or keep the current system?

Join Storm & Alexis and let us know where you stand.

#TVLicence #BBC #StormAndAlexis

snippet.title: Ham Radio for Beginners Ep. 13 | Coax & Connectors Explained
snippet.description:
Your radio and antenna are only as good as the cable connecting them.

In Episode 13 of the Ham Radio for Beginners series, Josh AA4WX explains coaxial cable, feed lines, and the most common connectors used in amateur radio. Learn the differences between RG-58, RG-8X, and LMR-400, when cable length matters, how to protect outdoor connections, and why choosing the right connector can improve the reliability of your station.

Whether you're setting up your first handheld, mobile radio, or HF base station, understanding coax is a fundamental part of building an effective ham radio station.

In this episode:
What coaxial cable does
RG-58 vs. RG-8X vs. LMR-400
Does coax length matter?
Understanding signal loss
PL-259 connectors
BNC connectors
SMA connectors
N connectors
Adapters
Weatherproofing outdoor coax
Common beginner mistakes
